name: Caramel Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 6 ingredients in a bowl; sprinkle the mixture into a greased 13x9x2-inch pan without pressing.
2. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
3. In the top of a double boiler over boiling water, cook and stir caramels and milk until the caramels are melted.
4. Pour the caramel mixture over the crust.
5. Top with chocolate chips and nuts.
6. Sprinkle with the remaining oat mixture.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
9. Refrigerate to set the caramel.
